summary: Complete testing of Tabela de Preço (Price Table) system. All features implemented successfully.
seed_data_creation: Created test tarifa in Table 2 during backend tests (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tabela de Preço system fully functional. 3 price tables working with different Km values. Folha de Horas modal allows table selection and shows correct Km price. Test using OT #356 (client: 560Lab).

Admin Dashboard - Tabela de Preço tab.details: Tab accessible, shows 3 sub-tabs (Tabela 1 with 4 tarifas, Tabela Premium with 1 tarifa, Tabela 3 with 0 tarifas)

Configuração de valor por Km.details: Edit Configuration dialog opens with Nome and Valor por Km fields. API PUT /api/tabelas-preco/{id} working correctly

Criar nova tarifa.details: Nova Tarifa dialog opens with Nome, Valor por hora, and Código Horário fields. API POST /api/tarifas working correctly with table_id association

Editar e eliminar tarifas.details: Edit/Delete buttons visible on tarifa cards. APIs PUT/DELETE /api/tarifas/{id} working correctly

Folha de Horas - Seleção de tabela.details: Modal shows 'Tabela de Preço' section with 3 table buttons showing €/km values. Clicking updates 'Informação' section with selected table's Km price

Geração de PDF com valor Km.details: Gerar PDF button visible. When table is selected, info shows correct Km price (e.g., 0.65€ for Tabela 1, 0.75€ for Tabela Premium)

api_tests_summary.GET /api/tabelas-preco: PASS - Returns 3 price tables with correct structure
api_tests_summary.GET /api/tarifas/all: PASS - Returns all tarifas including inactive
api_tests_summary.POST /api/tarifas: PASS - Creates tarifa with table_id association

ui_test_flow: 2. Navigate to Admin Dashboard via menu
7. Navigate to Technical Reports > Ordens de Trabalho
8. Click on OT #356 to open details
10. Verify Tabela de Preço section in modal
12. Verify Km price updates in Informação section
